code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    if not is_end
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          is_ws = true
        end
      when None
        is_ws = false
      end
    end
    if is_end or is_ws
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        if out == ""
          out = "#{tok} #{tok}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{tok} #{tok}"
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
